heading: Repealed. ,Aug. 11, 1955, ch. 790, § 269 Stat. 674
label: 369 to 376 Repealed. ,Aug. 11, 1955, ch. 790, § 269 Stat. 674
notes: Section 369, , , authorized annual appropriations for agricultural experiment stations. See .act Mar. 16, 1906, ch. 951, § 134 Stat. 63section 361c of this title

Section 369a, acts , §§ 1, 2, , 1554; , , extended provisions of former sections 343a, 343b, 361, 366, 369, 370, 371, 373 to 376, 380, and 382 of this title to Alaska. See .June 20, 1936, ch. 63149 Stat. 1553Aug. 29, 1950, ch. 82064 Stat. 563section 361a of this title
Section 370, , , authorized an additional appropriation of $60,000 for each fiscal year. See .act Feb. 24, 1925, ch. 308, § 143 Stat. 970section 361c of this title

Section 371, acts , ; , , made grants of money authorized for agricultural experiment stations subject to the legislative assent of the several States and Territories.Mar. 16, 1906, ch. 951, § 234 Stat. 63Feb. 24, 1925, ch. 308, § 243 Stat. 971
Section 372, , , provided for assent to installments of appropriations when the legislature is not in session.act June 7, 1888, ch. 37325 Stat. 176

Section 373, acts , ; , , prescribed the time and manner of payments to agricultural experiment stations and required a report of expenditures to the Secretary of Agriculture. See sections 361c and 361e of this title.Mar. 16, 1906, ch. 951, § 234 Stat. 63Feb. 24, 1925, ch. 308, § 243 Stat. 971
Section 374, acts , ; , , required the State to replace moneys misapplied. See .Mar. 16, 1906, ch. 951, § 334 Stat. 63Feb. 24, 1925, ch. 308, § 343 Stat. 971section 361e of this title

Section 375, acts , ; , , permitted use of funds for purchase, repairs, etc., of buildings, or for purchase or rental of lands. See .Mar. 16, 1906, ch. 951, § 334 Stat. 63Feb. 24, 1925, ch. 308, § 343 Stat. 971section 361d of this title

Section 376, acts , ; , , provided for certification of amounts due States for agricultural experiment stations, for withholding certificate, and for redress by Congress. See .Mar. 16, 1906, ch. 951, § 434 Stat. 64Feb. 24, 1925, ch. 308, § 443 Stat. 971section 361g of this title

Existing Rights and LiabilitiesAny rights or liabilities existing under sections 369 to 376 as unaffected by repeal, see section 2 of act , set out as a note under former .Aug. 11, 1955section 361 of this title
